text.p: Baba,
Bawo ni o? Hope you are adjusting well to your new station-- whether, food, new friends, etc? May His grace continue to abound towards you.
Thanks sir. I resumed in this week. However, the training they are offering here is far away from what my heart desires. Be praying for me for divine wisdom and patience to hear what God is saying.

Yes, I'm aware of the spiritual climate over there, and in general. It was almost a xtian continent. What happened that has now resulted in this sorry state? But the big question is, what do we need to do so that Nigeria and Africa will not go the same way?
May the Lord continue to build His church.

Two more weeks for and the children to join you. I've not asked her in the last 3days if their ticket money is in. If not, don't you think we may need to change strategy of raising that money? May the Lord continually bless you with His wisdom.
Shalom!
Greetings in Christ's name.
Trust God you had a nice journey back to . Praise God. Please send the s number(s). We give thanks to God for His deliverance on them.
We keep thanking God for you that in the fulness of time He will make clear His plans and empower you to follow Him in it - even more than your heart desires. 1John 5: 14 – 15
ALL IS WELL: It's our year of singing His praises
Bawo ni o? Hope you are adjusting well to your new station-- whether, food, new friends, etc? May His grace continue to abound towards you.
Just to check on you.
Beloved Friend and Partner,
Greetings. If you have not heard already, we guess you may have been wandering what is the result of our student visa application. Our request was turned down!
WHAT NEXT YOU MAY ASK? Please see the attached for details of our WAY FORWARD!
PLEASE INTENSIFY PRAYERS FOR US. AND DO NOT GIVE UP ON YOUR PLAN TO GIVE. WE NOW NEED MORE MONEY AT THIS INITIAL STAGE THAN WE INITIALLY THOUGHT OF!
As usual, we shall keep you informed of developments.
Your company has continued to make our faith journey enjoyable. Thanks for being an invaluable part of our lives.
Yours in seeking for ways to serve Him better,
Beloved Friend and Partner,
Greetings. Last week we sent you a special edition of our Newsletter. Hope you were able to download it and enjoyed reading it?

The attached is a further updates about us—especially of the boys and our proposed NEW BEGINNING. The 30 working days of our visa application processing by the Embassy expires this week. We hope to have result of our visa application by the end of this week. We continue to covet your earnest prayers for a favorable response.
Your company has continued to make our faith journey enjoyable. Thanks for being an invaluable part of our lives.
Yours in seeking for ways to serve Him better,
